---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for pacsDisplay
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Use Case

**Clinical/Technical Scenario:**
Describe the scenario where this feature would be useful.

**Current Workflow:**
How do you currently accomplish this task (if at all)?

**Limitation:**
What limitations exist with the current approach?

## Proposed Solution

Describe your suggested implementation.

**User Interface:**
How would users interact with this feature?

**Integration:**
Which application(s) would this affect?
- [ ] lumResponse
- [ ] lutGenerate
- [ ] loadLUTsingle
- [ ] uniLum
- [ ] iQC
- [ ] i1meter
- [ ] EDIDprofile
- [ ] QC-check
- [ ] uLRstats
- [ ] gtest
- [ ] ambtest
- [ ] pdLaunch
- [ ] New application
- [ ] Build system
- [ ] Documentation

**Configuration:**
Would this require new configuration options?

## Standards Compliance

Is this feature related to any medical display standards?

- [ ] DICOM Part 14 - Grayscale Standard Display Function
- [ ] AAPM Report 270 - Quality Control for PACS Display Systems
- [ ] AAPM TG-18 - Assessment of Display Performance
- [ ] IEC 62563-1 - Medical Electrical Equipment
- [ ] Other: _______

**Standard Reference:**
If applicable, cite specific sections or requirements.

## Alternative Solutions

Describe alternative approaches you've considered.

**Alternative 1:**
[Description]

**Pros/Cons:**
[Comparison]

## Impact

**Who would benefit:**
- [ ] Clinical medical physicists
- [ ] PACS administrators
- [ ] Radiology QC technologists
- [ ] Display calibration vendors
- [ ] Research institutions
- [ ] Other: _______

**Frequency of use:**
- [ ] Daily
- [ ] Weekly
- [ ] Monthly
- [ ] Annually
- [ ] Special circumstances

**Priority:**
- [ ] Critical - blocking current work
- [ ] High - significant improvement
- [ ] Medium - nice to have
- [ ] Low - future consideration

## Technical Considerations

**Hardware Requirements:**
Does this require specific hardware?
- [ ] New photometer models
- [ ] Specific display types
- [ ] Additional sensors
- [ ] Other: _______

**Cross-Platform:**
Should this work on:
- [ ] Windows only
- [ ] Linux (future)
- [ ] macOS (future)

**Dependencies:**
Would this require new external tools or libraries?

## Examples

**Similar implementations:**
Are there examples of this feature in other software?

**Mockups:**
If applicable, attach screenshots, diagrams, or mockups.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or examples about the feature request here.
